title: Maqqedah #4719
definition:
Makkedah = "place of shepherds"

 1) the location of a cave in Judah where Joshua captured and executed
    five Canaanite kings during the conquest; located near Bethhoron
    and Libnah
nasbUsage:

 1) the location of a cave in Judah where Joshua captured and executed
    five Canaanite kings during the conquest; located near Bethhoron
    and Libnah
